summary: Frontend-only e2e testing of the new Quiz page (/quiz) and Printables navigation links. All 11 review-request scenarios passed including scoring variation between paths, email validation/skip, add-to-cart, share buttons, restart, back button, and all new Printables/Quiz navigation links (header desktop+mobile, footer, blogs banner, blog detail callout).
critical_code_review_comments: On initial page load the ProductsContext logs 'Error fetching products, using fallback: TypeError: Failed to fetch' twice — the page falls back to bundled products so UX is not impacted, but this transient fetch failure should be investigated (possibly CORS/preview-URL race with React StrictMode double-invocation). Not blocking.

QuizPage.jsx email validation uses simple includes('@') && includes('.') — sufficient for soft-gate UX, but ideally use a regex (e.g. /^[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+$/) so values like 'a@b.' or '.@a' don't pass. Minor.

Progress percentage formula `((qIndex) / QUESTIONS.length) * 100` shows 0% on the very first question (qIndex=0). Consider `((qIndex + 1) / (QUESTIONS.length + 1)) * 100` or similar so users see immediate progress. Cosmetic.
test_credentials: Not used — quiz is public. Admin creds in /app/memory not needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz feature is fully functional. Verified: intro->4 questions->email gate->result. Scoring variation confirmed (Path A all idx 0 -> De Kalmeerder/Pinguïn id=9; Path B all idx 1 -> De Dromer/Magische Eenhoorn id=5). Email validation rejects empty/no-@/no-dot inputs with quiz-email-error element. quiz-email-skip works. quiz-result-add-to-cart adds product to cart and opens CartSidebar (verified Pinguïn x1 in cart screenshot). quiz-result-view-product href=/product/9 correct. WhatsApp/Facebook share hrefs encoded correctly with /quiz shareUrl. quiz-restart returns to intro. quiz-back-button returns to previous question. All nav links validated: nav-desktop-pro (href=/pro with 'Nieuw' badge), nav-mobile-pro, nav-desktop-quiz, footer-printables, blogs-printables-banner, blog-digital-callout-all-printables — all point to /pro and the /pro page itself loads successfully.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defects found. Initial test run reported two false positives (email error on 'invalid' string and add-to-cart) that were caused by incorrect Playwright selectors/assertions in the first script; the retest with corrected selectors confirmed both behaviours work as designed.
